chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No. 398 of 2023 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi [ K. Electric Limited V. M/s Abdullah Engineering Works & another ] Date of hearing: 10.04.2025 Date of decision: 10.04.2025 Appellant: Through Ayan Mustafa Memon, Advocate. Respondent No.1: Through M/s. M. Saleem Chaudhry & M. Safdar Khokhar, Advocates. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J: After arguing the case at some length, learned counsel for the Appellant submits that he is not satisfied with the impugned order, as the earnest money amounting to Rs.65 Million, a portion of 5 per cent of bid amount, deposited by the Respondents in the Court in compliance of the Court order is liable to be forfeited in favour of the Appellant. However, in order to establish and enforce such forfeiture, he will file a Suit before the relevant Court and, therefore, with this understanding and arrangement, he is not pressing this Appeal. Learned counsel for the Respondents have no objection to this prayer. In the terms as above, this Appeal is disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. The Appeal is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE M. Khan
